heading: Supplying steam or chilled water to Union Station complex
label: 6909 Supplying steam or chilled water to Union Station complex
text: The Architect of the Capitol may make agreements with the Secretary of Transportation to furnish steam, chilled water, or both from the Capitol Power Plant to the Union Station complex, at no expense to the legislative branch.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)690940:819(d)., as added , , .Pub. L. 90–264, title I, § 119(d)Pub. L. 97–125, § 3(3)95 Stat. 1672Dec. 29, 1981The words “or his designee or assign” are omitted because of 49:322(b)
